title: Telegram trigger not responding due to invalid secret
symptom: When using the Telegram trigger in test mode, n8n hangs and returns 'Provided secret is not valid'. No messages are triggered.
applies_when: Running n8n behind a reverse proxy
not_this_if: Using Telegram trigger without a reverse proxy
root_cause: The Telegram trigger may hang due to improper network configuration, especially when n8n is behind a reverse proxy that does not support websocket connections. This can prevent the trigger from receiving events properly.
fix_steps: Check your reverse proxy configuration (Nginx, Caddy, etc.) for websocket support.
Add the provided configuration to your Nginx settings to enable websocket proxying.
Restart your Nginx server to apply the changes.
Reopen the n8n workflow and try the Telegram trigger in test mode again.
agent_instruction: Update your reverse proxy configuration to support websockets and restart the server.
